message: We decided to use Strategy pattern for the transport layer
Architecture decision: Ollama for local LLM eval to save cloud tokens
Bug root cause: race condition in WebSocket reconnection logic causing duplicate messages
Requirement change: API must support batch operations with max 100 items per request
Design decision: use SQLite for KB storage because single-user local-first architecture
Workflow: PR review requires both standards check and spec compliance check before merge
Technical debt: OllamaAdapter needs retry logic for transient 503 errors
Decision: fire-and-forget pattern for hook calls to avoid blocking user interaction
Security: all LLM inference must stay local - no user data sent to cloud APIs
Performance requirement: smart ingest must complete within 3 seconds including LLM inference
